# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent any

  options {
    timestamps()
    ansiColor('xterm')
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30', artifactNumToKeepStr: '10'))
  }

  parameters {
    choice(
      name: 'SHELL',
      choices: ['bash', 'sh'],
      description: 'Shell to execute commands with.'
    )

    text(
      name: 'PREPARE_COMMANDS',
      defaultValue: '''set -euo pipefail
echo "Prepare step (optional)"''',
      description: 'Commands to prepare environment (optional).'
    )

    text(
      name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS',
      defaultValue: '''set -euo pipefail
echo "Build step"
# e.g. ./gradlew clean assemble
# e.g. mvn -B -U clean package
# e.g. npm ci && npm run build''',
      description: 'Build commands to run.'
    )

    text(
      name: 'TEST_COMMANDS',
      defaultValue: '''set -euo pipefail
echo "Test step (optional)"
# e.g. ./gradlew test
# e.g. mvn -B test
# e.g. npm test''',
      description: 'Test commands to run (optional).'
    )

    text(
      name: 'DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
      defaultValue: '''set -euo pipefail
echo "Deploy step (optional)"
# e.g. ./scripts/deploy.sh
# e.g. kubectl apply -f k8s/''',
      description: 'Deployment commands to run (optional).'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'RUN_PREPARE',
      defaultValue: true,
      description: 'Run PREPARE_COMMANDS'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'RUN_BUILD',
      defaultValue: true,
      description: 'Run BUILD_COMMANDS'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'RUN_TESTS',
      defaultValue: true,
      description: 'Run TEST_COMMANDS'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'RUN_DEPLOY',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'Run DEPLOY_COMMANDS'
    )

    booleanParam(
      name: 'ALLOW_UNSAFE_COMMANDS',
      defaultValue: false,
      description: 'If false, blocks suspicious commands (rm -rf /, mkfs, dd to disk, fork bombs).'
    )

    string(
      name: 'EXTRA_ENV',
      defaultValue: '',
      description: 'Extra environment variables (newline-separated KEY=VALUE).'
    )
  }

  environment {
    CI = 'true'
  }

  stages {
    stage('Init') {
      steps {
        script {
          def setEnvFromText = { String text ->
            if (!text) return
            text.split(/\r?\n/).each { line ->
              def l = line?.trim()
              if (!l || l.startsWith('#')) return
              def idx = l.indexOf('=')
              if (idx <= 0) {
                error("Invalid EXTRA_ENV line (expected KEY=VALUE): ${l}")
              }
              def k = l.substring(0, idx).trim()
              def v = l.substring(idx + 1)
              if (!(k ==~ /[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*/)) {
                error("Invalid env var name in EXTRA_ENV: ${k}")
              }
              env."${k}" = v
            }
          }

          def suspicious = [
            ~/rm\s+-rf\s+\/(\s|$)/,
            ~/mkfs(\.| )/,
            ~/dd\s+.*of=\/dev\/(sd|hd|vd|xvd|nvme)/,
            ~/:>\s*\/dev\/sd[a-z]/,
            ~/\(\s*\)\s*\{\s*:\s*\|\s*:\s*&\s*\}\s*;\s*:/ // fork bomb
          ]

          def validateCommands = { String label, String commands ->
            if (params.ALLOW_UNSAFE_COMMANDS) return
            if (!commands) return
            suspicious.each { re ->
              if ((commands =~ re).find()) {
                error("Blocked suspicious command in ${label}. Set ALLOW_UNSAFE_COMMANDS=true to override.")
              }
            }
          }

          setEnvFromText(params.EXTRA_ENV ?: '')

          validateCommands('PREPARE_COMMANDS', params.PREPARE_COMMANDS)
          validateCommands('BUILD_COMMANDS', params.BUILD_COMMANDS)
          validateCommands('TEST_COMMANDS', params.TEST_COMMANDS)
          validateCommands('DEPLOY_COMMANDS', params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS)
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Prepare') {
      when { expression { return params.RUN_PREPARE && (params.PREPARE_COMMANDS?.trim()) } }
      steps {
        script {
          if (params.SHELL == 'bash') {
            sh(label: 'Prepare', script: """#!/usr/bin/env bash
${params.PREPARE_COMMANDS}
""")
          } else {
            sh(label: 'Prepare', script: """#!/usr/bin/env sh
${params.PREPARE_COMMANDS}
""")
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      when { expression { return params.RUN_BUILD && (params.BUILD_COMMANDS?.trim()) } }
      steps {
        script {
          if (params.SHELL == 'bash') {
            sh(label: 'Build', script: """#!/usr/bin/env bash
${params.BUILD_COMMANDS}
""")
          } else {
            sh(label: 'Build', script: """#!/usr/bin/env sh
${params.BUILD_COMMANDS}
""")
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Test') {
      when { expression { return params.RUN_TESTS && (params.TEST_COMMANDS?.trim()) } }
      steps {
        script {
          if (params.SHELL == 'bash') {
            sh(label: 'Test', script: """#!/usr/bin/env bash
${params.TEST_COMMANDS}
""")
          } else {
            sh(label: 'Test', script: """#!/usr/bin/env sh
${params.TEST_COMMANDS}
""")
          }
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy') {
      when { expression { return params.RUN_DEPLOY && (params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS?.trim()) } }
      steps {
        script {
          if (params.SHELL == 'bash') {
            sh(label: 'Deploy', script: """#!/usr/bin/env bash
${params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS}
""")
          } else {
            sh(label: 'Deploy', script: """#!/usr/bin/env sh
${params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS}
""")
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    always {
      echo "Build completed: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
    }
  }
}
